description: A suspect in a corporate espionage case is believed to be exfiltrating intellectual property by appending encrypted archives to the end of standard family photographs on a USB drive. Triage the images within the disk image /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd to identify files containing hidden appended data. Create an Autopsy case named 'Steganography_Triage_2024' with case number 'INV-STEG-001'. Extract all identified JPEGs to /home/ga/Reports/extracted_jpegs/ and analyze their binary structure to locate the last occurrence of the JPEG End of Image (EOI) marker (\xFF\xD9) and calculate any extraneous appended data. Generate a pipe-delimited CSV report at /home/ga/Reports/steg_analysis.csv with the header FILENAME|FILE_SIZE|LAST_EOI_OFFSET|EXTRANEOUS_BYTES; if a file lacks an EOI marker, record the offset as -1 and extraneous bytes as 0. Additionally, write a summary report to /home/ga/Reports/steg_summary.txt containing the total JPEGs analyzed, the count of JPEGs with appended data, and a list of suspicious filenames that contain extraneous bytes.
